description: Product Description The nitrile rubber O-ring kit has good heat resistance: -30℃/-22℉ to 120℃/248℉. The kit satisfies all the requirements for your seal, used for common maintenance and replacement, is a good helper for maintenance workers. 6 common thicknesses to meet your different choices. Nitrile O-rings are the most widely used O-ring material in life. It has excellent oil resistance, good water tightness, high temperature resistance and wear resistance, and corrosion resistance. Various advantages Metric O-Ring Kits in 32 Popular Sizes to Meet Nearly All Your Everyday Needs.
